text.title: Company Prompt Library Pattern Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to convert an ad-hoc prompt mess into a versioned, evaluated, owned library spec.

step.name: inventory
step.input: 30-day chat-history dump + git log + manual sweep of repos
step.action: Catalogue every prompt currently sent to an LLM by anyone in the org. Bucket by role (PM / dev / QA) and task (review / spec / code). Note frequency.
step.output: inventory.csv with columns: prompt-text, source, frequency, role, task

step.name: namespace
step.action: Group prompts into namespaces: `prompts/role/<role>/` for role-pack and `prompts/task/<task>/` for task-pack. Anything with frequency <3 in 30 days goes into archive, not the library.
step.decision-gate: If a role-pack has fewer than 3 prompts, collapse into company-override layer (per allowed-transformations in 02-output-contract.xml).

step.name: override-layers
step.action: For each prompt, declare which layer wins: faion-defaults, role-pack, company-override, repo-override. Resolution order is fixed; only the declaration changes.

step.name: eval-gate
step.input: role-pack list + golden-set seed (20 rows per pack)
step.action: Wire the CI gate: deterministic check (JSON-Schema OR regex) + rubric-based LLM-as-judge scorer. Block-on-fail = true. Schedule nightly drift check too.

step.name: owner-assignment
step.action: Assign a single named owner per role-pack and one overall library owner. No 'team' / 'we'. Record in `prompts/OWNERS.yaml`.
step.output: OWNERS.yaml, with CI failing when a pack has no owner
step.decision-gate: If a pack has no owner candidate, archive the pack and reroute consumers to faion-defaults.

step.name: rollout
step.action: Merge the spec to repo. Announce 2-week migration window. Add `pre-commit` hook that rejects inline prompt strings >200 chars containing 'you are' / 'assistant'.

list.item: All steps produced their declared output
Owner has signed off (named human, not 'team')
Eval gate is green on main
